Authored by Claude Opus 4.8 (Claude Code), /lead-role. Session 3ecb40bf-bfef-40b1-8693-a8aae5afa1b7.

Resolves #12480

Refs #12451
Refs #12456

(First reshape burndown of #12451's declarative-reshape half — the lint guard landed via #12474/#12472. This is the fail-closed static chroma case.)

The `engines.chroma.database` leaf branched inline on `process.env.UNIT_TEST_MODE` — imperative env-resolution baked into the declarative config SSOT (exactly the class the #12474 lint now bans). Made declarative.

Evidence: L2 — 21 ChromaManager specs pass via the `test-unit` script (isolation + the fail-closed guard); SSOT lint green at 3 baselined (the chroma row burned down).

## What shipped
- `ai/config.template.mjs`: `database: leaf(CHROMA_PRODUCTION_DATABASE, 'NEO_CHROMA_DATABASE', 'string')` (was an inline `UNIT_TEST_MODE ? test : prod` branch). Dropped the now-unused `CHROMA_TEST_DATABASE` import; JSDoc updated to describe the declarative default + env override + the fail-loud backstop.
- `package.json`: the `test-unit` script sets `NEO_CHROMA_DATABASE=neo-unit-test` (the reliable worker-reaching shell-env channel; the `playwright.config.unit.mjs` in-process mutation doesn't reliably reach workers — which is why `npm run test-unit` is mandated over bare `npx`).
- `lint-config-template-ssot.mjs`: dropped the now-reshaped `NEO_CHROMA_DATABASE` `BASELINE` row (burndown — lint stays green at 3).

## Why it's safe (fail-closed)
`ChromaManager.mjs:120` refuses `CHROMA_PRODUCTION_DATABASE` under `UNIT_TEST_MODE` → a missed/wrong override fails **loud**, never silently pollutes production. That by-construction backstop is why the leaf no longer needs its own test-branch.

## Deltas from ticket
Resolves #12480 fully (1:1 with its ACs). Relative to #12451: this is the chroma static case only; the graph (`NEO_MEMORY_DB_PATH`) static case + the dynamic collection-name cases remain on #12451 (distinct risk — the graph store lacks an equivalent fail-closed guard; the dynamic names need a per-worker test bootstrap).

## Test Evidence
- **21/21 ChromaManager specs pass** (`npm run test-unit -- .../managers/ChromaManager*.spec.mjs`): incl. *"the constructed ChromaClient targets the isolated test database"*, *"resolveChromaClientConfig fails closed: refuses the production database under UNIT_TEST_MODE (#12335 AC1)"*, *"isolated from production (AC1/AC2)"*, + the full canonical-guard suite.
- SSOT lint: `OK - 3 inline-env leaf default(s), all baselined` (the chroma instance + its baseline row both gone; no stale-row). `node --check` passes; husky (whitespace/shorthand/ticket-archaeology) green.

## Post-Merge Validation
- [ ] Unit suite resolves the chroma test database (`neo-unit-test`) under `UNIT_TEST_MODE` via the `test-unit` script (no prod-DB refusal).
- [ ] No new `NEO_CHROMA_DATABASE` inline-env default reintroduced (the SSOT lint guards this going forward).
